memoryArtifacts.headline: Lost memorial to Sir Payne Roet in St. Paul's Cathedral, London (destroyed in the Great Fire of 1666).
memoryArtifacts.description:
Lost memorial to Sir Payne Roet in St. Paul's Cathedral, London (destroyed in the Great Fire of 1666). 
From p. 55 of The history of St. Paul's Cathedral in London by William Dugdale, 1658. 

See also: http://www.humphrysfamilytree.com/Roet/index.html

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Payn de Roet於1310年12月25日出生在比利時海瑙特勒 洛利時，他的父親PAYN de ROET , Sir35歲，母親MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT30歲。他和Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他於1348年在比利時海瑙特被列為in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre。他去世於1380年在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年70歲，埋葬在英國倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Payn de Roet于1310年12月25日出生在比利时海瑙特勒 洛利时，他的父亲PAYN de ROET , Sir35岁，母亲MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT30岁。他和Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他于1348年在比利时海瑙特被列为in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre。他去世于1380年在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年70岁，埋葬在英国倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: nickname for someone with a deformity of the foot or with big feet, Middle Dutch voet ‘foot’.

nameMeanings.name: Payn
meanings: An old name derived from Latin paganus, a countryman, a peasant.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Payn de Roet was born on 25 December 1310, in Le Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, PAYN de ROET , Sir, was 35 and his mother, MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. In 1348, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre in Hainaut, Belgium. He died in 1380, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 70, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Payn de Roet est né le 25 décembre 1310, à Le Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, PAYN de ROET , Sir, avait 35 ans et sa mère, MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. En 1348, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre à Hainaut, Belgique. Il est décédé en 1380, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Payn de Roet am 25. Dezember 1310 in Le Roeulx, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater PAYN de ROET , Sir 35 und seine Mutter MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT 30. Er hatte mit Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1348, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre in Hennegau, Belgien aufgeführt. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payn de Roet è nato il il 25 dicembre 1310 nel Le Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, PAYN de ROET , Sir, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. Nel 1348, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre nel Hainaut, Belgio. Morì nel 1380, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Payn de Roetが1310年12月25日にベルギーヘイナトル ローウルックスで生まれた時，父PAYN de ROET , Sirは35歳，母MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULTは30歳であった。彼はCountess Katherine de Roët Avesnesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1348年，40歳の時，ベルギーヘイナトでの職業はin service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hreと記録されている。彼は1380年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで70歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Payn de Roet(이)가 1310년 12월 25일 벨기에 하인오트 일 로우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 PAYN de ROET , Sir(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1348년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 벨기에 하인오트에서 in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre이었다. 그는 1380년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payn de Roet nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1310, em Le Roeulx, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, PAYN de ROET , Sir, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. Em 1348, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre em Hainaut, Bélgica. Ele faleceu em 1380, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Payn de Roet родился 25 декабря 1310 г. в местности л роеулкс, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени PAYN de ROET , Sir было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. В 1348 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre в местности ханаут, Бельгия. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Payn de Roet nació el 25 de diciembre de 1310, en Le Roeulx, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, PAYN de ROET , Sir, tenía 35 años y su mamá, MARIA CHRISTINA de HAINAULT, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes. En 1348, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era in service to marguerite, empress of the hre, by request to queen phillipa, sister of marguerite empress of the hre en Hainaut, Bélgica. Murió en 1380, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.
